meaning: n.否决,禁止,否决权vt.否决,禁止
examples: They need 12 votes to override his veto.
That would mean voting no, that is to say, using the veto.
The British government used its veto to block the proposal.
The plan faces an uphill battle in the Senate, and the White House has promised to veto.
Mr. DIMSDALE: Yeah, well he's threatening to veto it, because it does make the deficit worse.
